title: Persistent Browser Profiles
overview: Add --profile flag for persistent Chromium contexts via launchPersistentContext(). All browser state persists automatically. Mutually exclusive with --session.
scopeChallenge: Existing code has launch() and launchWithBrowser(). Need third mode launchPersistent() using Playwright's launchPersistentContext(). Returns BrowserContext directly (no Browser object), which changes lifecycle. Profile dirs at .browse/profiles/<name>/.

failureModes.mitigation: Store context directly, use context.browser() which may be null
Throw clear error or skip context recreation for persistent profiles

failureModes.risk: Profile directory locked by running server
failureModes.mitigation: Check for running server state file before delete
Validate mutual exclusion early in CLI

tasks.title: Add launchPersistent() to BrowserManager
tasks.description: Add third launch mode using chromium.launchPersistentContext(). Returns BrowserContext directly. Update close() for persistent mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing pages from profile registered as tabs
close() works correctly in persistent mode
recreateContext() handles persistent mode (error or workaround)

tasks.title: Profile directory management
tasks.description: Create profile dirs at .browse/profiles/<name>/ with sanitizeName() validation. Helper functions for listing and deleting.

tasks.title: Server profile mode — skip SessionManager
tasks.description: When BROWSE_PROFILE is set, use launchPersistentContext instead of launch+SessionManager. Single BrowserManager, no multiplexing.
acceptanceCriteria: BROWSE_PROFILE starts server in profile mode

tasks.title: CLI --profile flag
tasks.description: Add --profile <name> to CLI, validate mutual exclusion with --session, pass as BROWSE_PROFILE env var to server.
acceptanceCriteria: BROWSE_PROFILE env var works as alternative

tasks.title: Profile management commands
tasks.description: Add profile list/delete/clean subcommands in meta.ts. List shows profiles with size, delete removes directory, clean removes old ones.
acceptanceCriteria: profile list shows profiles with size
profile delete with no name throws usage error
Cannot delete profile in use by running server

tasks.title: Integration tests
tasks.description: Test persistent profile lifecycle, cookie persistence across restarts, mutual exclusion, profile commands, invalid names.

tasks.title: Documentation
tasks.description: Update SKILL.md, README, CHANGELOG with --profile flag, profile commands, profile vs session guidance.
